name: attach_hockey_stick_gripper
description: Attaches a long box geometry to the robot hand to act as a hockey stick.
source_code:
async def attach_hockey_stick_gripper():
    return await attach_gripper(
        gripper_xml='<body name="hockey_stick" pos="0 0 0.11">' 
                    '<geom type="box" size="0.02 0.02 0.15" rgba="0.4 0.2 0.1 1" mass="0.1"/>' 
                    '</body>',
        tcp_offset="0 0 0.26"
    )
